info.name: DummyJSON API — Core Requirements Suite
info.description: One folder per test agent (test-authentication-flows, verify-crud-operation-integrity, validate-search-and-filter-queries); each request is named by the test_case_id it matches in that agent's cases.json. Set {{base_url}} to https://dummyjson.com and run top-to-bottom (test-authentication-flows › TC-AUTH-001 captures {{token}}/{{refreshToken}}).

item.name: test-authentication-flows
TC-AUTH-001 — Login with valid credentials returns 200 + accessToken + refreshToken

request.description:
Tokens returned in body and as cookies.

Expected: HTTP 200.

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }

request.description:
Token minted with a past exp via the shared auth_spec recipe.

Expected: HTTP 401.

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }

item.name: TC-AUTH-009 — GET /auth/me after logout (revoked) — JWT is stateless, so behaviour is a coverage gap

request.description:
Ambiguity: DummyJSON JWTs are stateless; logout may NOT invalidate an issued token. Recorded, not asserted strictly.

Expected: HTTP 401.

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }

item.name: verify-crud-operation-integrity
TC-CRUD-001 — GET /products returns a paginated product list (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("products is array", function(){ var v=get(json,"products"); pm.expect(Array.isArray(v)).to.be.true; });

item.name: TC-CRUD-002 — GET /products/1 returns a single product with the expected shape (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }

item.name: TC-CRUD-003 — POST /products/add echoes the new product with an id (201, simulated)

request.description:
DummyJSON SIMULATES creation: it returns a success body + a fresh id but does NOT persist.

Expected: HTTP 201.

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("title == 'Forge Test Widget'", function(){ pm.expect(get(json,"title")).to.eql("Forge Test Widget"); });
pm.test("id is number", function(){ var v=get(json,"id"); pm.expect(typeof v === "number").to.be.true; });

item.name: TC-CRUD-004 — GET the freshly-created product id returns 404 — documented non-persistence (not a bug)

request.description:
Proves the simulated contract: the add succeeded but nothing was stored.

Expected: HTTP 404.

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }

item.name: TC-CRUD-005 — PUT /products/1 echoes the changed field (200, simulated)

request.description:
Update is simulated: the changed field is echoed back, not persisted.

Expected: HTTP 200.

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("title == 'Forge Updated Title'", function(){ pm.expect(get(json,"title")).to.eql("Forge Updated Title"); });

item.name: validate-search-and-filter-queries
TC-SEARCH-001 — GET /products/search?q=phone returns matching products (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("products is array", function(){ var v=get(json,"products"); pm.expect(Array.isArray(v)).to.be.true; });

item.name: TC-SEARCH-002 — GET /products/search?q=<nonsense> returns an empty product set (200, total 0)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("products is array", function(){ var v=get(json,"products"); pm.expect(Array.isArray(v)).to.be.true; });

item.name: TC-SEARCH-003 — GET /products/category/smartphones returns only that category (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("products is array", function(){ var v=get(json,"products"); pm.expect(Array.isArray(v)).to.be.true; });

item.name: TC-SEARCH-004 — GET /products/categories returns the category list (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("$root is array", function(){ var v=get(json,"$root"); pm.expect(Array.isArray(v)).to.be.true; });

item.name: TC-SEARCH-005 — GET /products?limit=5&skip=10 honours pagination (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }

item.name: TC-SEARCH-006 — GET /products?select=title,price returns only the selected fields (+id) (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }

pm.test("products[] keys subset of ['id', 'title', 'price']", function(){ var al=["id", "title", "price"]; get(json,"products").forEach(function(it){ Object.keys(it).forEach(function(k){ pm.expect(al).to.include(k); }); }); });

item.name: TC-SEARCH-007 — GET /products?sortBy=title&order=asc returns title-sorted products (200)

exec: var json = (function(){ try { return pm.response.json(); } catch(e){ return {}; } })();
function get(o,p){ if(p==='$root') return o; return p.split('.').reduce(function(a,k){ return (a==null)?undefined:a[k]; }, o); }
pm.test("products sorted by title asc", function(){ var ks=get(json,"products").map(function(it){return it["title"];}); var s=ks.slice().sort(); if(false) s.reverse(); pm.expect(ks).to.eql(s); });
